label: Encoder-only bidirectional transformers

node.label: Encoder-only bidirectional transformers
node.definition: Encoder-only transformers use bidirectional self-attention to contextualize an entire input for representation learning, classification, retrieval, and token-level prediction.
node.why_it_matters: They separate contextual understanding from autoregressive generation and remain central to embedding and discriminative NLP systems.
limitations: They do not natively generate long outputs autoregressively and usually need task-specific heads or a separate decoder.

dependencies.rationale: Encoder-only bidirectional transformers extends or specializes the architecture family Transformers.

In this atlas graph, Encoder-only bidirectional transformers has an `optimizes_for` dependency on Masked prediction objectives because Masked prediction objectives is modeled as the objective family for learning, selection, or evaluation.
Encoder-only bidirectional transformers is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component Causal, masked & structured masking.
Encoder-only bidirectional transformers consumes, emits, or organizes information using Embeddings & distributed representations.

sentence_units.text: Encoder-only transformers use bidirectional self-attention to contextualize an entire input for representation learning, classification, retrieval, and token-level prediction.
They separate contextual understanding from autoregressive generation and remain central to embedding and discriminative NLP systems.
They do not natively generate long outputs autoregressively and usually need task-specific heads or a separate decoder.
Encoder-only bidirectional transformers extends or specializes the architecture family Transformers.

In this atlas graph, Encoder-only bidirectional transformers has an `optimizes_for` dependency on Masked prediction objectives because Masked prediction objectives is modeled as the objective family for learning, selection, or evaluation.
Encoder-only bidirectional transformers is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component Causal, masked & structured masking.
Encoder-only bidirectional transformers consumes, emits, or organizes information using Embeddings & distributed representations.
